history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, high-contrast, atmospheric, medium shot photograph of a male martial artist with bleached, spiky hair, wearing a traditional gi and belt. He is in profile, looking down and to his left, with his hands adjusting his belt. A circular emblem with a stylized pagoda or building motif is visible on the left breast of his gi. The background is blurred and shows rows of spectators in the distance, with horizontal lines suggesting bleachers or a railing. The lighting is dramatic, casting strong shadows and highlighting the textures of the gi. The overall mood is intense and focused. Text overlays include a TikTok handle "@yuribentex" and "Francois | @baze31media" in the bottom corners, along with a logo "BAZE 31". The style is gritty and cinematic, reminiscent of sports photography.
